item.author: quannah.rose

item.title: Wow. This is a dream come true🥹beyond honored and grateful to have been able to ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@quannah.rose

Wow. This is a dream come true🥹beyond honored and grateful to have been able to work with such an incredible team. The creativity and vision is so beautiful, blessed to have been included along side icons @ambervalletta & @linazhanglina 🥰working with these beautiful women was sooooo fun. Amber has been a day 1, first model/someone from the “industry” to ever follow me and support my advocacy before I even signed with my agency and started modeling, was so good to connect with you🤍 Mahsi’choo to everyone who made this happen😭🪶🖤

摄影 Photographer Cass Bird, you’re a badass. Ily🫶🏽✨ @cassblackbird

创意总监 Artistic Director Matt Mcdonald @mattrmcdonald

造型 Stylist 於家骅 Alvin Yu @alvinyu613

发型 Hair Stylist Panos Papandrianos @panosphair

化妆 Make Up Artist Romy Soleimani💖 @romyglow

美术 Set Design Jill Nicholls

灯光 Lighting Clay Howard Smith @clay.howardsmith

编辑 Editor 陈欣颖 Lexi Chen

统筹编辑 Production Editor Anita Lau @anita_lauu, Julie Wang @juliewang2529

模特 Models Amber Valletta @ambervalletta, 张丽娜 @linazhanglina, Quannah ChasingHorse @quannah.rose

选角 Casting Gabrielle Seo @gabrielleseo

灯光助理 Lighting Assistants Daniël van der Deen @danielvanderdeen, Alex Kalb @_kalby_

数码协助 Digital Assistant Anthony Miller

制作 Producer Lola Production @lolaproduction

时装助理 Fashion Assistants Bebe Bolortoli @bebebolortoli, Madison Wen Gu @mmmaddddison, Amontae Arnold

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@quannah.rose

Wow. This is a dream come true🥹beyond honored and grateful to have been able to work with such an incredible team. The creativity and vision is so beautiful, blessed to have been included along side icons @ambervalletta & @linazhanglina 🥰working with these beautiful women was sooooo fun. Amber has been a day 1, first model/someone from the “industry” to ever follow me and support my advocacy before I even signed with my agency and started modeling, was so good to connect with you🤍 Mahsi’choo to everyone who made this happen😭🪶🖤

摄影 Photographer Cass Bird, you’re a badass. Ily🫶🏽✨ @cassblackbird

创意总监 Artistic Director Matt Mcdonald @mattrmcdonald

造型 Stylist 於家骅 Alvin Yu @alvinyu613

发型 Hair Stylist Panos Papandrianos @panosphair

化妆 Make Up Artist Romy Soleimani💖 @romyglow

美术 Set Design Jill Nicholls

灯光 Lighting Clay Howard Smith @clay.howardsmith

编辑 Editor 陈欣颖 Lexi Chen

统筹编辑 Production Editor Anita Lau @anita_lauu, Julie Wang @juliewang2529

模特 Models Amber Valletta @ambervalletta, 张丽娜 @linazhanglina, Quannah ChasingHorse @quannah.rose

选角 Casting Gabrielle Seo @gabrielleseo

灯光助理 Lighting Assistants Daniël van der Deen @danielvanderdeen, Alex Kalb @_kalby_

数码协助 Digital Assistant Anthony Miller

制作 Producer Lola Production @lolaproduction

时装助理 Fashion Assistants Bebe Bolortoli @bebebolortoli, Madison Wen Gu @mmmaddddison, Amontae Arnold

item.author: quannah.rose

item.title: All I can think about is little Quannah. Growing up without seeing your people r...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@quannah.rose

All I can think about is little Quannah. Growing up without seeing your people represented in this way, of beauty, makes you feel like it could never be you and it never WILL be you.
Too all the people and kids that made fun of my nose, how skinny and how tall I am, how ugly my features seemed to be to everyone else, thank you because you built character in me and helped me find my voice but also🖕🏽 you for making me believe I was never good or pretty enough.
All my teen years and younger, I never truly felt beautiful. I would’ve never imagined in my lifetime that I could be on the COVER of the Oct. 2022 Best of Beauty issue for Allure Magazine. What an honor and Mahsi’choo (big thanks/ thank you very much) @allure for this opportunity and for being a part of changing perspectives and breaking barriers for those who may have felt the same as me growing up.
🪶💖✨
📸 - @cassblackbird
🧥- @heathermary.jackson
💇🏽‍♀️ - @naeemahlafond
💄 - @romyglow

Article by @alyssaklondon is linked in bio✨🫶🏽

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@quannah.rose

All I can think about is little Quannah. Growing up without seeing your people represented in this way, of beauty, makes you feel like it could never be you and it never WILL be you.
Too all the people and kids that made fun of my nose, how skinny and how tall I am, how ugly my features seemed to be to everyone else, thank you because you built character in me and helped me find my voice but also🖕🏽 you for making me believe I was never good or pretty enough.
All my teen years and younger, I never truly felt beautiful. I would’ve never imagined in my lifetime that I could be on the COVER of the Oct. 2022 Best of Beauty issue for Allure Magazine. What an honor and Mahsi’choo (big thanks/ thank you very much) @allure for this opportunity and for being a part of changing perspectives and breaking barriers for those who may have felt the same as me growing up.
🪶💖✨
📸 - @cassblackbird
🧥- @heathermary.jackson
💇🏽‍♀️ - @naeemahlafond
💄 - @romyglow

Article by @alyssaklondon is linked in bio✨🫶🏽

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: quannah.rose

item.title: I can’t describe how happy, honored, and excited I am to be the cover of @voguem...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (2 medier)

@quannah.rose

I can’t describe how happy, honored, and excited I am to be the cover of @voguemexico for the May issue✨
I had such an amazing time working with everyone on set and I feel so lucky to have been given this opportunity.
My ancestors have been giving me strength, guidance and continue to bless me with opportunities and so much more.
Mahsi’choo everyone for all the love and support! It’s means so much and I can’t begin to describe how thankful I am. 🥺💛🌞🙏🏽

Fotografía: @inezandvinoodh
Realización: @georgecortina
Peinado: @jamespecis @_antonalexander
Maquillaje: @fulviafarolfi
Casting: @legainsbourg
Producción: @michael.gleeson / @valecollado
Earrings: Melissa Charlie @melissacharlie1254 💛

(Link in bio for article🤗)

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (2 medier)

@quannah.rose

I can’t describe how happy, honored, and excited I am to be the cover of @voguemexico for the May issue✨
I had such an amazing time working with everyone on set and I feel so lucky to have been given this opportunity.
My ancestors have been giving me strength, guidance and continue to bless me with opportunities and so much more.
Mahsi’choo everyone for all the love and support! It’s means so much and I can’t begin to describe how thankful I am. 🥺💛🌞🙏🏽

Fotografía: @inezandvinoodh
Realización: @georgecortina
Peinado: @jamespecis @_antonalexander
Maquillaje: @fulviafarolfi
Casting: @legainsbourg
Producción: @michael.gleeson / @valecollado
Earrings: Melissa Charlie @melissacharlie1254 💛
